sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: New Royal ONE Credit Cards to Reward Spending Across 3 Cruise Brands
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group and Bank of America have launched new Royal ONE Visa Signature and Royal ONE Plus Visa Signature credit cards. These cards aim to simplify how travelers earn and redeem rewards across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea brands. The program offers accelerated points on everyday and vacation spending, along with various travel perks.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions (MSI) Receives New Coverage with "Buy" Rating by Truist Securities | MSI Stock News
feed.summary: Truist Securities has initiated coverage on Motorola Solutions (MSI) with a "Buy" rating and a price target of $540. This new rating follows a series of positive analyst activities for MSI, reflecting growing confidence in the company, which is a leading provider of communications and analytics for public safety and other sectors. The average one-year price target from 10 analysts is $493.00, implying a 14.96% upside from the current price.

feed.title: FDA Flags Serious Liver Risks with Amgen's Tavneos (AMGN)
feed.summary: The FDA has issued a warning regarding severe liver injuries, including vanishing bile duct syndrome, linked to Amgen's drug Tavneos (avacopan). This poses new safety concerns despite liver toxicity being noted in clinical trials. Amgen, a biotechnology leader with a market cap of $189.81 billion, shows strong profitability but faces declines in operating and gross margins, along with insider selling.

feed.title: Dow's 450-point rally highlighted by gains for Caterpillar, Amazon.com Inc. stocks
feed.summary: This article reports on a rally in the Dow Jones Industrial Average, which saw a 450-point increase. The rally was notably driven by significant gains in the stock prices of Caterpillar and Amazon.com Inc.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: A Sweet Time at the NYSE as Hershey Hosts its Investor Day
feed.summary: The NYSE daily pre-market update on March 31, 2026, highlights Hershey's Investor Day with Chief Growth and Marketing Officer Stacy Taffet joining NYSE Live. The update also covers rising markets, AI's role in cybersecurity, and Dimensional Fund Advisors' new ETF launch.

feed.title: Gartner Forecasts Rising Explainable AI Demand to Boost LLM Observability Adoption in GenAI
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2028, the growing importance of explainable AI (XAI) will increase large language model (LLM) observability investments to 50% of GenAI deployments, up from 15% today. This surge is driven by the need for trust mechanisms as the GenAI market is expected to exceed $75 billion by 2029. XAI provides visibility into model reasoning, while LLM observability validates response generation, both being crucial for GenAI maturity beyond controlled environments.

feed.title: Amgen CEO Bob Bradway's 2025 Letter to Shareholders
feed.summary: Amgen CEO Bob Bradway's 2025 Letter to Shareholders highlights a strong performance in 2025 with total revenues of $36.8 billion and a 26% share increase. The letter details significant investments in R&D and manufacturing, advancements across its four therapeutic areas (General Medicine, Rare Disease, Inflammation, and Oncology), and the growth of its biosimilars market segment. Amgen also emphasizes its commitment to patient access through programs like AmgenNow and its sustainability and community initiatives.

feed.title: GE Aerospace Stock Slid 8% Last Week. Here’s What Could Drive the Next Move
feed.summary: GE Aerospace stock (GE) fell 8% last week despite positive company announcements, influenced by broader market concerns like rising fuel prices and profit-taking after a strong rally. The underlying business remains robust with strong demand and service growth, indicated by solid Q4 2025 results and positive 2026 guidance. Investors are now looking to Q1 2026 earnings for updates on engine deliveries, service growth, and management’s outlook amidst macro volatility, with commercial aerospace demand and production ramps being key drivers.

feed.title: Meta Platforms Inc Stock (META) Moved Up by 4.03% on Mar 31: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Meta Platforms Inc (META) stock rose by 4.03% on March 31, driven by Morgan Stanley naming it a "Top Pick" and positive sentiment around its AI advancements, including new smart glasses and AI support. The company's financial outlook also appears strong, with analysts predicting earnings growth and Meta initiating a dividend. Investors are currently weighing these positive developments more heavily than ongoing legal and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty Ties K‑Beauty Launchpad And AI Fulfillment To Growth Narrative
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty is expanding its K-Beauty World platform to quickly bring viral Korean beauty brands to the U.S. market, while also doubling e-commerce fulfillment stores and utilizing AI for order and inventory management. This strategy allows brands proving demand online, like Dr. Melaxin, to rapidly transition to nationwide in-store distribution. The initiative aims to align with consumer interest in global brands and faster product discovery, leveraging technology and partnerships across digital and physical channels.

feed.title: Perimeter Solutions (NYSE:PRM) Trading Up 10.7% After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Perimeter Solutions (NYSE:PRM) saw its stock price increase by 10.7% following an upgrade from UBS Group, which raised its rating from neutral to buy with a $30 price target. Despite the positive analyst action, insider selling has occurred, with a director selling a significant number of shares, and the company reported a negative net margin despite beating quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. The stock currently holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: CNBC to broadcast daily from Cboe’s Chicago trading floor By Investing.com
feed.summary: CNBC announced a multi-year collaboration with Cboe Global Markets to broadcast daily programming directly from Cboe’s Chicago trading floor starting April 6. This initiative aims to provide real-time market coverage, focusing on options activity and volatility, utilizing Cboe's proprietary data and a dedicated options reporter. The collaboration capitalizes on the significant growth in U.S. options trading volume, which reached 15.2 billion contracts in 2025, benefiting Cboe’s financial performance.

feed.title: A $4,000 Stock Is About to Become Affordable: Inside Booking’s Historic Split
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) is set to undergo a 25-for-1 forward stock split, making its shares more accessible to retail investors by reducing the price from over $4,000 to approximately $165. The company announced this historic split alongside strong Q4 2025 results, including 16.1% revenue growth and a 9.4% dividend increase, demonstrating accelerating fundamentals despite recent stock pullback. While stock splits don't change underlying value, they enhance accessibility, though post-split performance ultimately depends on business fundamentals, as shown by other mega-cap splits.

feed.title: Why Is Apellis Stock Skyrocketing Tuesday? - Apellis Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:APLS), Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB)
feed.summary: Apellis Pharmaceuticals' stock is skyrocketing after Biogen announced its intent to acquire the company for $41 per share in cash, totaling approximately $5.6 billion. This acquisition is expected to bolster Biogen's immunology and rare disease portfolio, particularly with Apellis's FDA-approved therapies Empaveli and Syfovre, which generated $689 million in combined net sales in 2025. The deal includes a contingent value right for Apellis shareholders and is projected to enhance Biogen's revenue and adjusted earnings per share starting in 2027.

feed.title: MBIA Inc Stock: Analyzing the Financial Guaranty's Path Forward for North American Investors
feed.summary: This article analyzes MBIA Inc, a key player in financial guaranty insurance, focusing on its strategic positioning, core business model, and relevance for North American investors. It discusses MBIA's evolution post-2008 crisis, its prudent underwriting in public finance, and examines the sector drivers and economic context influencing its performance. The piece also highlights key risks and open questions, urging investors to monitor quarterly earnings and regulatory filings to assess the company's path forward.

feed.title: Ford AI executive joins Home Depot to lead tech and AI strategy
feed.summary: The Home Depot has appointed Dr. Franziska "Fran" Bell as its new Executive Vice President and Chief Technology Officer, effective April 6, 2026. Bell, who previously led AI transformation at Ford Motor Company, will be responsible for the strategy, development, and alignment of technology, product management, data, and artificial intelligence for the company. Her expertise is expected to drive the enterprise-wide integration of agentic AI and machine learning to enhance experiences for associates, DIYers, and Pro customers.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Broker Explored Defense Investment for Hegseth Ahead of Iran Strike: FT
feed.summary: A Morgan Stanley broker reportedly explored a multi-million-dollar investment in a defense-focused fund for U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth weeks before military action against Iran, according to the Financial Times. The inquiry to BlackRock about its Defense Industrials Active ETF was flagged internally, with the report noting the timing could draw scrutiny given Hegseth's role in U.S. policy toward Iran. While the Pentagon denied the report and the investment was not made through Morgan Stanley, the situation highlights increased attention on trading activity preceding major policy decisions.

feed.title: Shoptalk: AI Hot Takes from Google, The Home Depot, David Yurman, OpenAI & More
feed.summary: The Shoptalk Spring event highlighted that AI is rapidly transforming retail, with "agentic commerce" creating significant opportunities. Experts from Google, The Home Depot, David Yurman, and OpenAI discussed how AI is enhancing customer intent understanding, personalizing experiences, and improving operational efficiency, emphasizing that AI's pace of change surpasses previous tech advancements. The general consensus is that retailers need to strategically integrate AI while determining where human interaction remains critical.

feed.title: High Oil Prices Will Hurt Colgate-Palmolive Stock According to Wall Street
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) has been downgraded from Buy to Hold by TD Cowen due to surging oil-based input costs exacerbated by the Iran War and weak North American sales. Analyst Robert Moskow cut the price target to $85 from $96, as these cost pressures are expected to compress margins and lead to reduced earnings estimates for 2026-2027, despite solid Q4 2025 results. The stock has already seen a significant pullback, and tighter margins threaten its dividend growth streak.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Raises Valero Energy (VLO) Price Target to $292 | VL
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Valero Energy (VLO) to $292 from $220, maintaining an "Overweight" rating, indicating strong confidence in the company's future. This adjustment reflects a 32.73% rise and follows several other analysts' upgrades for Valero Energy. The company, a major independent refiner, shows positive sentiment among Wall Street analysts, despite a projected average target price suggesting a downside from its current trading price.

feed.title: Is Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Price Near US$60 Supported By Cash Flow And Earnings Models
feed.summary: This article analyzes Bristol-Myers Squibb's (BMY) stock price of US$59.73 using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio models. The DCF analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 50.5%, with an estimated intrinsic value of US$120.67 per share. Comparing BMY's P/E of 17.29x to its Fair Ratio of 24.19x also indicates undervaluation, positioning it favorably against industry and peer averages.

feed.title: Fanta Teams Up with Xbox to Deliver the Ultimate Global Gaming Challenge to Fans: Wanta Fanta? Come Get It!
feed.summary: Fanta and Xbox are collaborating for a global gaming challenge as part of Xbox's 25th Anniversary. This partnership introduces a special edition collection of Fanta products featuring iconic Xbox characters and a new flavor, Fanta Crimson. Fans can unlock in-game challenges and rewards by purchasing these products, with the campaign launching in April 2026 across over 60 markets.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Downgrades Nomad Foods(NOMD.US) to Hold Rating, Cuts Target Price to $10
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has downgraded Nomad Foods (NOMD.US) from a Buy to a Hold rating and reduced its target price to $10. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook on the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Atlantic Emergency Solutions Named 2025 Pierce Dealer of the Year for Exceptional Growth and Customer Commitment
feed.summary: Pierce Manufacturing Inc. has awarded Atlantic Emergency Solutions the 2025 Pierce Dealer of the Year for its exceptional performance in apparatus and aftermarket sales, operational growth, and significant investments in service capabilities. Atlantic Emergency Solutions expanded its service network throughout 2025, adding new facilities and prioritizing technician development to support fire departments. This award reflects the dealership's dedication to customer commitment and strong growth.

feed.title: Eightco Holdings Inc. recently announced its assets under management, with a total holding value reaching as high as 326 millions USD.
feed.summary: Eightco Holdings Inc. announced its assets under management, totaling $326 million. The portfolio prominently features nearly 280 million Worldcoin (WLD) and over 11,000 Ethereum (ETH), indicating a significant presence in the cryptocurrency market. This highlights the company's strategic positioning within the crypto sector.

feed.title: Intercont (Cayman) (NASDAQ: NCT) enacts 25-for-1 reverse share split to meet bid rule
feed.summary: Intercont (Cayman) Limited (NASDAQ: NCT) is implementing a 25-for-1 reverse share split, effective April 2, 2026, to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum $1.00 bid price requirement. This consolidation will reduce the total number of authorized ordinary shares from 1,000,000,000 to 40,000,000 and adjust the par value to $0.0025 per share. Fractional shares will be rounded up, and shareholders holding shares electronically or in brokerage accounts are not required to take any action.

feed.title: Restore Robotics Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance for Two Additional da Vinci Xi® Robotic Instruments
feed.summary: Restore Robotics has received additional FDA 510(k) clearances for the remanufacturing of two more da Vinci Xi® robotic surgical instruments. This expands their portfolio, allowing them to provide cost-effective, high-quality, and sustainable alternatives to new instruments for hospitals and surgery centers. The collaboration with Encore Medical Device Repair enhances distribution and aims to improve cost efficiency and environmental stewardship in surgical care.

feed.title: SLB, Azule Energy expand digital platform to optimize Angola operations
feed.summary: SLB has signed a three-year agreement with Azule Energy to expand the deployment of its Delfi digital platform across Azule Energy's operations in Angola. This expansion aims to enhance execution efficiency and streamline upstream workflows, building on the platform's prior use in reservoir modeling and well planning. The initiative targets improved decision-making speed and consistency, particularly through integrating subsurface data with planning and execution processes, with digital solutions supported by SLB’s Luanda Performance Center.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group to Launch New Set of Credit Cards
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has partnered with Bank of America and Visa to introduce two new credit cards, the Royal ONE Visa and Royal ONE Plus Visa. These cards allow customers to earn and redeem rewards across all three of the company's brands: Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea Cruises. The rewards can be used for cruise savings, specialty dining, shore excursions, Wi-Fi, and other onboard experiences, enhancing the loyalty program for frequent cruisers.

feed.title: SDI Presence Appoints LaDarius Jackson as Vice President of ServiceNow Delivery
feed.summary: SDI Presence LLC has appointed LaDarius Jackson as Vice President of Delivery, ServiceNow. Jackson brings over a decade of experience in leading enterprise ServiceNow transformations and will oversee implementation excellence, delivery governance, and the evolution of SDI's ServiceNow platform strategy. This appointment aims to strengthen SDI's commitment to providing AI-enabled service management solutions and innovation within the ServiceNow ecosystem.

feed.title: Perpetua Resources (NASDAQ: PPTA) files shelf to sell Common, debt and other securities
feed.summary: Perpetua Resources Corp. (PPTA) has filed an S-3 shelf registration statement, allowing it to offer an indeterminate amount of common shares, preferred shares, debt securities, warrants, subscription receipts, and units over time. The filing also includes a resale prospectus for currently held common shares by certain selling shareholders. This move provides the company with financial flexibility for future capital needs and outlines specific terms for potential offerings and existing investor participation rights.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Healthcare Companies: Boston Scientific (BSX) and Abbott Laboratories (ABT)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish sentiments on healthcare companies Boston Scientific (BSX) and Abbott Laboratories (ABT). Leerink Partners analyst Mike Kratky reiterated a Buy rating on Boston Scientific with a price target of $89.00, while Bank of America Securities analyst Travis Steed maintained a Buy rating on Abbott Laboratories. Both stocks also have a Strong Buy analyst consensus rating from the broader Street.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP ENHANCES TRAVEL LOYALTY, PARTNERS WITH BANK OF AMERICA TO LAUNCH ROYAL ONE™ AND ROYAL ONE PLUS™ CREDIT CARDS
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has partnered with Bank of America to launch new tri-branded credit cards, Royal ONE™ and Royal ONE Plus™. These cards will allow travelers to earn and redeem rewards across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea, offering flexible redemption options and travel perks. The initiative aims to enhance customer loyalty and provide greater value for vacation experiences.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP ENHANCES TRAVEL LOYALTY, PARTNERS WITH BANK OF AMERICA TO LAUNCH ROYAL ONE™ AND ROYAL ONE PLUS™ CREDIT CARDS
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group and Bank of America have partnered to launch the Royal ONE™ and Royal ONE Plus™ Visa Signature® credit cards, marking the cruise industry's first tri-branded cards. These new cards aim to simplify how travelers earn and redeem rewards across Royal Caribbean, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea, offering accelerated rewards on everyday spending and cruise vacations. The initiative is part of Royal Caribbean Group's broader strategy to reimagine loyalty and provide greater value to its guests.

feed.title: Allergan Aesthetics Announces Fourth Annual, All-Access CoolMonth with Deals on CoolSculpting®
feed.summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company, announced its fourth annual CoolMonth, offering exclusive deals on CoolSculpting® for the entire month of April 2026. First-time users can claim $400 off their initial treatment, and there are opportunities to win exciting giveaways through Instagram. The campaign aims to encourage individuals to pursue their aesthetic goals, especially given the rising interest in body contouring ahead of summer.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC): Navigating the Storage Supercycle and the 2026 Sector Sell-Off
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) has transformed into a pure-play HDD powerhouse after separating its Flash business in 2025, now focusing on high-capacity cloud storage for AI infrastructure. Despite a recent industry-wide sell-off due to new software compression technologies, the company is strategically positioned to capitalize on the ongoing "Storage Supercycle" driven by soaring data demands. The article explores WDC's post-separation business model, financial performance, product innovations focusing on areal density, and the risks and opportunities ahead for investors.

feed.title: Coca-Cola will report quarterly results before the market opens April 28
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. This will be followed by an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, with a webcast available for investors. The company, a total beverage entity with products in over 200 countries, will also provide downloadable files and a transcript within 24 hours on its website.

feed.title: Free trees could cut summer power bills by up to 20% on Long Island
feed.summary: PSEG Long Island is celebrating Earth Month by distributing 500 free trees to customers in partnership with Suffolk County, RISE, the PSEG Foundation, and the Arbor Day Foundation. These trees, available for reservation starting April 1, can help customers save up to 20% on summer home energy bills once fully grown. Additionally, the utility will be giving away LED lightbulbs and reusable shopping bags to promote energy savings and environmental sustainability.

feed.title: Emerson Electric Receives Wall Street Upgrade to Buy and Price Target to $175
feed.summary: Jefferies upgraded Emerson Electric (NYSE: EMR) to Buy from Hold, raising its price target to $175 from $160. This upgrade is driven by a compelling inflection thesis, anticipating strong order momentum to boost earnings growth from low-single-digits in H1 FY2026 to low-double-digits by year-end. Despite a recent 15.88% loss over the past month, pushing the stock 21% below its 52-week high, analysts believe accelerating orders and expanding margins make it a potential entry point for investors.

feed.title: PNC Announces New Initiatives to Inspire Outdoor Learning, Classroom Innovation Through PNC Grow Up Great
feed.summary: PNC Grow Up Great is launching new initiatives with Sesame Workshop and DonorsChoose to promote outdoor learning and classroom innovation. A $6.2 million grant to Sesame Workshop will support the development of resources for outdoor and play-based learning, focusing on science, math, and literacy skills. Additionally, PNC has fully funded nearly 1,000 DonorsChoose classroom projects and will double volunteer grants to encourage employee participation in these educational efforts.

feed.title: Cboe and CNBC Launch Multi-Year Collaboration to Deliver Daily Live Market Coverage from Chicago Trading Floor
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets and CNBC have announced a multi-year partnership to broadcast live daily market coverage from Cboe's Chicago trading floor, starting April 6. This collaboration aims to provide real-time analysis of market activity, particularly focusing on the growing options market, to a broader audience. CNBC will utilize Cboe's proprietary data and establish a dedicated broadcast studio on the trading floor, featuring a specialized options reporter to enhance investor education and transparency.

feed.title: Cboe and CNBC Launch Multi-Year Collaboration to Deliver Daily Live Market Coverage from Chicago Trading Floor
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets and CNBC have announced a multi-year collaboration to provide daily live market coverage from Cboe's Chicago trading floor, starting April 6. This partnership aims to offer real-time analysis of market volatility and options trading, driven by the increasing demand for U.S. options. CNBC will utilize Cboe's proprietary data and establish a broadcast studio on the trading floor to deliver deeper insights and educational content to investors.

feed.title: Booking Holdings to post Q1 results April 28, webcast at 4:30 ET
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) announced it will webcast its first-quarter 2026 financial results and host a conference call on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. A press release with the results will be available at approximately 4:00 p.m. ET on the company's investor website. An audio replay of the webcast will also be accessible on the investor site for seven days following the call.

feed.title: The Coca-Cola Company Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 28, before the New York Stock Exchange opens. This will be followed by an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, with a webcast available for investors. Downloadable files and a transcript will be provided on the company’s website within 24 hours of the call.

feed.title: Building a new home with U.S. Bank? Loan draws now move up to 70% faster
feed.summary: U.S. Bank has partnered with Built, an AI-native platform for real estate and construction finance, to streamline the process of financing new construction homes. This collaboration allows consumer mortgage borrowers and commercial clients to manage construction loan draws, inspections, and communication more efficiently, potentially accelerating funding times by up to 70%. The platform aims to reduce delays, minimize manual work, and provide real-time visibility into project progress for all parties involved.

feed.title: IFFF Secures First Heart Health Claim for Soy Protein in Australia and New Zealand – Company Announcement
feed.summary: IFF announced that Food Standards Australia New Zealand (FSANZ) has accepted a heart health claim for isolated soy protein, allowing food and beverage manufacturers to link soy protein consumption with healthy blood cholesterol levels. This regulatory milestone provides new growth opportunities in Australia and New Zealand for products formulated with 20-25 grams of isolated soy protein daily. The claim is backed by extensive research and makes Australia and New Zealand the latest countries to recognize soy protein's benefits for cardiovascular health, following markets like the US, Canada, and Japan.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE NAMES BILL CASHEL AS HEAD OF ALTERNATIVES FOR ITS WEALTH CHANNEL
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has appointed Bill Cashel as the Head of Alternatives for U.S. Wealth, a new role aimed at strengthening intermediary engagement and expanding the firm's alternatives offerings. Cashel will focus on delivering alternative investment capabilities from both T. Rowe Price and Oak Hill Advisors to wealth advisors. This appointment underscores T. Rowe Price's commitment to broadening access to private markets and alternative solutions for investors.

feed.title: Ford owners get trail maps, hunting apps and offline routes free for a year
feed.summary: Ford is partnering with onX to offer eligible U.S. Ford owners a complimentary one-year membership to onX Offroad, onX Hunt, onX Backcountry Elite, and onX Fish Midwest. This collaboration provides access to extensive off-road routes, hunting functionalities, backcountry trails, and fishing information. The initiative aims to enhance the software-enabled ownership experience for Ford vehicles and supports the company's focus on personalization for outdoor enthusiasts.

feed.title: L3Harris will post first-quarter results before markets open April 30
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will then host an earnings call the same day at 10:30 a.m. ET, with participants encouraged to listen via webcast on L3Harris.com. A replay of the call will also be available on the company's website.

feed.title: IBM and ETH Zurich Collaborate on Quantum Computing Algorithms
feed.summary: IBM and ETH Zurich have announced a decade-long collaboration focusing on advancing algorithms at the intersection of AI and quantum computing. This partnership aims to develop new algorithms to solve critical business challenges and will include IBM supporting professorships and research projects at ETH Zurich. The initiative leverages both entities' strengths to drive scientific discovery, economic growth, and cultivate future algorithm experts.
